recommendations.title: Cheap Thrills
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and facing eviction, a new dad has his life turned upside down when he meets a wealthy couple who offer a path to financial security... but at a price.

recommendations.title: Small Crimes
recommendations.overview: A disgraced former cop, fresh off a six-year prison sentence for attempted murder, returns home looking for redemption but winds up trapped in the mess he left behind.

recommendations.title: Güeros
recommendations.overview: Set amidst the 1999 student strikes in Mexico City, this coming-of-age tale finds two brothers venturing through the city in a sentimental search for an aging legendary musician. Shot in black-and-white, Güeros brims with youthful exuberance.

recommendations.title: Underworld: Endless War
recommendations.overview: Follows Selene across 3 separate periods in history as she hunts a group of Lycan brothers.

recommendations.title: ABCs of Death 2
recommendations.overview: Taking all that was great from the first instalment, the movie aims to be a wilder, leaner, faster-paced and even more entertaining anthology this time around, with a new crop of award-winning, visionary filmmakers from around the globe.
recommendations.director: Jen Soska, Robert Morgan, Julian Barratt, Juan Martínez Moreno, Hajime Ohata, Bruno Samper, Jim Hosking, Rodney Ascher, Jerome Sable, Marvin Kren, Todd Rohal, Sôichi Umezawa, Chris Nash, Alexandre Bustillo, Alejandro Brugués, Dennison Ramalho, Wolfgang Matzl, Aharon Keshales, Julian Gilbey, Kristina Buožytė, Robert Boocheck, E.L. Katz, Julien Maury, Larry Fessenden, Bill Plympton, Lancelot Oduwa Imasuen, Sylvia Soska, Steven Kostanski, Erik Matti, Vincenzo Natali, Navot Papushado

recommendations.title: Backcountry
recommendations.overview: A couple on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Trilogy of Terror
recommendations.overview: A horror anthology containing three stories: a female college professor is aggressively pursued by one of her students; a prudish brunette determines that her free-spirited blonde sister is evil; and a woman's night turns upside down after she purcha

recommendations.title: Last of the Dogmen
recommendations.overview: A Montana bounty hunter is sent into the wilderness to track three escaped prisoners. Instead he sees something that puzzles him. Later with a female Native Indian history professor, he returns to find some answers.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Got Away
recommendations.overview: A female serial killer who killed four young girls is sent away to prison, but a fifth victim escaped with her life. Twenty years later, the killer escapes and begins hunting for the one who got away.
